title: Print container state when erroring that it is improper
body: This is a nice little convenience - lets people know why we won't let them attach to a container.

comments.body:
LGTM
just in case the bot is case sensitive.

@stevekuznetsov Any idea why openshift-ci-robot is ignoring a large number (feels like ~half) of PRs and issues in this repo and not properly tagging them? This is a notable one, but I've been having to manually set labels on a number

Mergebot still works, at least.
